response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video duration to identify audio content. 2. Determined that the background audio is a continuous instrumental loop. 3. Confirmed no vocal music exists in the video, therefore no song metadata or lyrics to resolve. 4. Created scene breaks based on significant transitions in the visual slideshow content.
response.global_summary: The video is a pre-concert waiting screen featuring a slideshow of concert merchandise, announcements, and fan messages. The audio consists of a looping instrumental background track, and no vocal music is present.

scenes.description: The video starts with a title screen announcing the 'hololive 3rd generation live' concert.
The screen shows an 'Attention' graphic with concert guidelines.
The video transitions to a series of slides showing various concert merchandise.
The video displays various fan messages and artwork as part of a slideshow.
